summary: Tested P0 PICKS panel tab switching and duplicate quick replies bugs. BOTH FIXES VERIFIED WORKING. Tab switching now correctly changes products per pillar (Celebrate shows party items, Care shows health items, Dine shows food items). Quick replies no longer duplicate - they show only in header tiles when inline, with bottom section correctly skipped.
critical_code_review_comments: PICKS Panel Tab Fix (PersonalizedPicksPanel.jsx lines 744-772): Using useRef instead of useState for userSelectedPillarRef prevents stale closure issues. The ref.current = true immediately on click locks the pillar selection and prevents enginePillar from overriding user choice.

Quick Reply Duplicate Fix (MiraDemoPage.jsx lines 4207-4245): The fix correctly checks if lastMsg has quick_replies in msg.data?.quick_replies OR msg.data?.conversation_contract?.quick_replies and skips rendering bottom QuickReplies when inline ones exist.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 225 verified the two P0 frontend fixes: (1) PICKS panel pillar tab switching now works correctly - clicking Celebrate shows celebration products (Go Bananas Box), Care shows care products (Eye Care Drops), Dine shows food (Mutton & Veggies Meal). The fix uses useRef for userSelectedPillarRef which prevents stale closures. (2) Quick replies no longer duplicate - they appear in header tiles only, with console log confirming 'Skipping bottom section - already rendered inline with message'.

picks_panel_tab_switching.celebrate_tab: Shows celebration products: Go Bananas Box, Berry Much Love Box, Googly Ghoul Dognuts
picks_panel_tab_switching.care_tab: Shows care products: Eye Care Drops, Grooming Schedule Guide, Professional Training Clicker
